# @vllnt/ui ‚Äî full reference for AI consumption

> React component library ‚Äî 144 accessible components built on Radix UI primitives, Tailwind CSS, and CVA. Distributed via the public npm registry with OIDC-signed provenance, and via a shadcn-compatible registry at https://ui.vllnt.ai/r.

---

## Package

- **Name:** `@vllnt/ui`
- **Version:** `0.2.0`
- **License:** MIT
- **Language:** TypeScript (strict)
- **Package manager:** pnpm (workspaces + Turborepo)
- **Runtime targets:** React 18+, Tailwind CSS 3+
- **Distribution:**
  - Public npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@vllnt/ui
  - shadcn registry: https://ui.vllnt.ai/r
  - Docs: https://ui.vllnt.ai
  - Storybook: https://storybook.vllnt.ai

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @vllnt/ui
```

### Peer dependencies

Required: `react`, `react-dom`, `tailwindcss`.
Optional (only for `ThemeProvider`, `NavbarSaas`, `LangProvider`): `next`, `next-themes`.

## Setup

1. Apply the Tailwind preset:

   ```ts
   // tailwind.config.ts
   import uiPreset from "@vllnt/ui/tailwind-preset";

   export default {
     presets: [uiPreset],
     content: ["./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}"],
   };
   ```

2. Import styles once (e.g. in `app/layout.tsx`):

   ```ts
   import "@vllnt/ui/styles.css";
   ```

3. Import and render components:

   ```tsx
   import { Button, Card, Badge } from "@vllnt/ui";
   ```

## Exports

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `@vllnt/ui` | All components, hooks, types, and `cn()` utility |
| `@vllnt/ui/tailwind-preset` | Tailwind preset config |
| `@vllnt/ui/styles.css` | Tailwind base + default theme + safe-area utilities |
| `@vllnt/ui/themes/default.css` | CSS variables only (no Tailwind base) |

## Conventions

Every component:

- Uses `React.forwardRef` + `React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef` on the shipped surface.
- Uses `cn()` from `src/lib/utils.ts` to merge Tailwind classes (clsx + tailwind-merge).
- Uses CVA (`class-variance-authority`) for variant props where variants exist.
- Wraps Radix primitives for accessible behavior (focus, keyboard, ARIA) where applicable.
- Supports `asChild` via `@radix-ui/react-slot` when composable rendering is useful.

Theming is driven by HSL CSS variables on `:root` (light) and `.dark` (dark mode). See `packages/ui/README.md` for the full variable list.

## Component families (144 components)

### Primitives (Radix)

Accordion, AlertDialog, AspectRatio, Avatar, Checkbox, Collapsible, ContextMenu, Dialog, DropdownMenu, HoverCard, Label, Menubar, NavigationMenu, Popover, RadioGroup, ScrollArea, Select, Separator, Slider, Switch, Tabs, Toggle, ToggleGroup, Tooltip.

### Layout

Card, Carousel, Resizable, Sheet, Drawer, HorizontalScrollRow, ViewSwitcher.

### Forms

Button, Input, InputOtp, InlineInput, NumberInput, PasswordInput, Textarea, DatePicker, FileUpload, Combobox, Command, Rating, Calendar.

### Feedback

Alert, Badge, Callout, Skeleton, Spinner, Toast, Tour.

### Navigation

Breadcrumb, Pagination, Sidebar, SidebarProvider, SidebarToggle, SearchBar, SearchDialog, KeyboardShortcutsHelp, FloatingActionButton, SocialFab.

### Data / Charts

AreaChart, BarChart, LineChart, CandlestickChart, SparklineGrid, MarketTreemap, OrderBook, TickerTape, MetricGauge, ActivityHeatmap, ActivityLog, Table, DataTable, DataList, StatCard, NumberTicker.

### AI

AiChatInput, AiMessageBubble, AiSourceCitation, AiStreamingText, AiToolCallDisplay, ThinkingBlock, ModelSelector.

### Financial

CandlestickChart, MarketTreemap, OrderBook, TickerTape, SparklineGrid, WalletCard, Watchlist.

### Ops / Status

StatusBoard, StatusIndicator, LiveFeed, WorldClockBar, SeverityBadge, RoleBadge, ScopeSelector.

### Billing & Plans

SubscriptionCard, PlanBadge, CreditBadge, UsageBreakdown.

### Animation

AnimatedText, BorderBeam, Marquee, NumberTicker, Spinner.

### Content

BlogCard, ProTip, Callout, CodeBlock, CodePlayground, Comparison, Faq, FlowDiagram, MdxContent, ProfileSection, Terminal, VideoEmbed, TldrSection, ShareSection, ShareDialog.

### Tutorial / Educational

ContentIntro, Exercise, Flashcard, KeyConcept, LearningObjectives, ProgressBar, ProgressCard, Quiz, StepByStep, StepNavigation, Stepper, TutorialCard, TutorialComplete, TutorialFilters, TutorialIntroContent, TutorialMdx, Checklist, Annotation, CompletionDialog, TruncatedText, TableOfContents, TableOfContentsPanel.

### App shell

NavbarSaas, ThemeProvider, ThemeToggle, LangProvider, CategoryFilter, FilterBar, CookieConsent, Slideshow, CountdownTimer, AvatarGroup.

## Patterns

### Variant components

```tsx
<Button variant="outline" size="sm">Small Outline</Button>
```

Variants are typed exports from each component module.

### Composition

```tsx
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button>Open</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Title</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>‚Ä¶</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

### Utilities

```tsx
import { cn, useDebounce } from "@vllnt/ui";
```

## Requirements

- React ‚â• 18
- Tailwind CSS ‚â• 3
- Next.js ‚â• 14 (optional ‚Äî only for Next-specific components)
- `next-themes` ‚â• 0.4 (optional ‚Äî for `ThemeProvider`, `ThemeToggle`)

## Publishing & Provenance

- Releases are cut via `workflow_dispatch` on `.github/workflows/publish.yml` (pick patch/minor/major).
- Every push to `main` publishes a canary build tagged `canary` (e.g. `@vllnt/ui@0.2.0-canary.<sha>`).
- All published artifacts carry a signed sigstore provenance attestation tied to the GitHub Actions run that produced them.

## Repository layout

```
vllnt/ui/
  packages/ui/                # @vllnt/ui source
  apps/registry/              # Next.js registry at ui.vllnt.ai
  .github/workflows/          # CI, publish, storybook
  AGENTS.md                   # canonical agent instructions
  CONTRIBUTING.md             # contributor guide
  SECURITY.md                 # vulnerability reporting
  CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md          # community standards
```

## Support

- Bugs / feature requests: https://github.com/vllnt/ui/issues
- Security: https://github.com/vllnt/ui/security/advisories/new
